rulings.Case Title: CORNELIUS MURPHY et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel The Depositions Of Defendant Svi Corporation'S Person Most Knowledgeable And Custodian Of Records And Request For Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, April 27, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel The Depositions Of Defendant SVI Corporation's Person Most Knowledgeable And Custodian Of Records And Request For Production Of Documents is continued to May 4, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 per agreement of the parties. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: HOWARD REENTS et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Rockwell Automation, Inc.S Further Responses To Special Interrogatories (Set One)
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, April 27, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel Rockwell Automation, Inc.¿s to provide further responses to special interrogatories is denied. The motion is untimely. Even if the motion was timely, plaintiffs have not shown that defendant¿s responses to interrogatories numbers 6 through 15 are inadequate or evasive absent further product specification or other narrowing of the scope of the interrogatories by plaintiffs. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder Of Plaintiffs Represented By Harowitz & Tigerman, Llp In Plaintiffs Motion To Compel The Annual Update To Response To General Order 129 Standard Plaintiffs Interrogatories From Defendant Moore Bros.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, April 27, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Harowitz & Tigerman¿s joinder in plaintiff¿s motion to compel the annual update to response to General Order 129 standard interrogatories from defendant Moore Bros. is granted. No opposition filed. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel The Annual Update To Responses To General Order 129 Standard Plaintiffs¿ Interrogatories From Defendant Amcord, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, April 27, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiff¿s motion to compel the annual update to responses to General Order 129 standard interrogatories from defendant Amcord, Inc. is denied as moot. Defendant has provided its annual updated responses and verification. Plaintiffs¿ request for sanctions is denied due to lack of meaningful meet and confer efforts prior to filing the motion. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Annual Update To Responses To General Order 129 Standard Plaintiffs' Interrogatories From Defendant Cahill Contractors, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, April 27, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiff¿s motion to compel the annual update to responses to General Order 129 standard interrogatories from defendant Cahill Contractors, Inc. is granted in part and denied in part. It is denied as moot because defendant has provided its annual updated responses. Defendant is ordered to provide a verification for these responses. Plaintiffs¿ request for sanctions is denied due to lack of meaningful meet and confer efforts prior to filing the motion. = (220/HEK)
